summary: GPT-5.6 prompt alignment is complete and task-scoped verification passes.
findings: The master contract centralizes shared outcome, autonomy, tool, response, and persistence rules; all 15 role profiles retain role-specific constraints without repeating gateway scaffolding; GPT-5.5 diagnostic compatibility remains exported.
evidence_refs: bun run agents:check; targeted prompt tests 24/24; bun run lint:core; bun run typecheck; node .agentplane/policy/check-routing.mjs; ap doctor
residual_risks: Local full-fast CI has one environment-specific release npm ci timeout under Node 26/npm 11; hosted CI remains required before integration.
